title: Add billing portal
goal: Add a billing portal entry point under settings.
acceptance_criteria: Users can open the billing portal from settings.
risks: Incorrect tenant mapping could expose the wrong portal session.

proposed_slices.title: Wire settings action
proposed_slices.summary: Add the settings action that creates a portal session through the existing backend endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: The settings page shows a billing portal action for eligible users.

rollback.approach: Guard the new entry point behind a feature flag that can be disabled.

security.approach: Reuse the existing server-side portal session creation path and keep Stripe keys server-only.

authentication.reason: The change reuses the existing authenticated session model without altering login flows.

authorization.approach: Only render the action for owners and enforce the same role check on the server.

decoupling.approach: Keep billing wiring inside the settings and billing modules without spreading Stripe calls into unrelated views.

unit.approach: Cover the visibility predicate for billing portal access.

integration.approach: Add an integration test for portal session creation and redirect handling.

regression.approach: Add a regression test for owner visibility on the settings page.

smoke.approach: Exercise the happy path in a smoke check against the settings flow.

bugfix_red.reason: This is feature work, not a bug fix.
